headlines.title: Volkswagen profits slump as it flags full-year revenue squeeze ahead of restructuring
headlines.summary: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.

headlines.title: South Korea's president invokes dramatic Japan realty crash to push domestic property agenda
headlines.summary: Lee was highlighting the country's excessive investment in real estate, and highlighted that Japan's housing market "burst like a balloon."

headlines.title: U.S. to see higher generic drug prices thanks to tariffs, CEO of leading India pharma firm warns
headlines.summary: CEO of Indian pharma company Dr Reddy's has warned that Trump's proposed tariffs on generic drugs will make them more expensive for patients.

headlines.title: Pentagon lowers official Iran war death toll, omitting four killed this month
headlines.summary: The Pentagon lowered its official Iran war death toll to 14 from 18, removing four service members killed this month.

strategies.price_above_ma200: 收盤價高於 200 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.ma20_cross_ma60: 20 日均線高於 60 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.buy_and_hold: 買入持有基準，用於比較策略是否優於單純持有。

assumptions.transaction_cost_note: 每次部位變化扣除 0.1% 交易成本，用於保守估計。
assumptions.lookahead_bias_control: 策略使用前一交易日訊號承擔下一交易日報酬，避免偷看未來資料。

signals.disclaimer: 研究訊號僅供分析，不是買賣建議。

symbols.observation_note: 正負條件尚未形成明確方向，維持一般追蹤。
